```text
1	type Detection = { sentence: string; level: string; reason: string };
2	
3	export function HighlightedContent({ content, detections }: { content: string; detections: Detection[] }) {
4	  if (!detections.length) {
5	    return <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-base leading-loose text-foreground">{content}</p>;
6	  }
7	
8	  let remaining = content;
9	  const parts: Array<{ text: string; level?: string; title?: string }> = [];
10	
11	  for (const d of detections) {
12	    const idx = remaining.indexOf(d.sentence);
13	    if (idx === -1) continue;
14	    if (idx > 0) parts.push({ text: remaining.slice(0, idx) });
15	    parts.push({ text: d.sentence, level: d.level, title: d.reason });
16	    remaining = remaining.slice(idx + d.sentence.length);
17	  }
18	  if (remaining) parts.push({ text: remaining });
19	
20	  return (
21	    <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-base leading-loose text-foreground">
22	      {parts.map((p, i) =>
23	        p.level ? (
24	          <mark key={i} className="bg-transparent text-foreground" title={p.title}>
25	            {p.text}
26	          </mark>
27	        ) : (
28	          <span key={i}>{p.text}</span>
29	        )
30	      )}
31	    </p>
32	  );
33	}
34
```

Findings, focused on the AI-generation result display in resume-web:

**Main component:** `e:\workspace\resume-pilot\resume-web\src\pages\WorkspacePage.tsx`

- Lines 370–396: When `result?.content` exists, it renders inside a `Card` (`data-testid="workspace-result-content"`), with:
  - Line 374: `<ScrollArea className="max-h-[min(60vh,520px)] pr-4">` — this is the container that wraps the generated text.
  - Line 376/392: content is split into paragraphs (`splitParagraphs`, line 40–41) and rendered via `<HighlightedContent content={...} detections={...} />`.
  - This `ScrollArea` **does** set a `max-h` (capped at 60vh or 520px) and is a Radix `ScrollArea` primitive, so scrolling should normally work via its internal Viewport.

**Content renderer:** `e:\workspace\resume-pilot\resume-web\src\components\HighlightedContent.tsx`
- Lines 5 and 21: renders a `<p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-base leading-loose text-foreground">` — no height/overflow constraints here (correct, since it's meant to grow and be scrolled by the parent).

**ScrollArea implementation:** `e:\workspace\resume-pilot\resume-web\src\components\ui\scroll-area.tsx`
- Line 12–16: Root gets `className={cn("relative", className)}` — the `max-h-[...]` passed from WorkspacePage lands on the **Root**, not the **Viewport** (line 17–22, which only has `size-full`).
- Since Root has `relative` and a max-height, but Viewport is `size-full` (100% of Root) with no independent overflow class of its own beyond what Radix's ScrollAreaPrimitive.Viewport applies internally (Radix sets `overflow: hidden/scroll` via its own internal style, so this part is normally fine) — this should work correctly given Radix handles overflow internally on Viewport.

**Also of note:** line 406, a second `ScrollArea` (`h-full max-h-[calc(100svh-7rem)]`) wraps the entire right-hand results panel — a nested scroll region.

**No obvious bug found**: The result container does have `max-h` + Radix `ScrollArea` (which sets overflow internally), so long content should scroll. If scrolling is reportedly broken, the more likely culprits are: (1) the outer panel's `max-h-[calc(100svh-7rem)]` (line 406) competing with the inner one causing double-scroll/height collapse, or (2) `Card`/`CardContent` (line 371–372) lacking a height constraint so `flex-1` doesn't actually bound the ScrollArea's height in the flex layout — worth checking `Card`'s parent flex container's `min-h-0` (a common Tailwind flex-scroll pitfall: nested flex children need `min-h-0` for `max-h`/`overflow` to take effect).

```text
355	            min={0}
356	            max={100}
357	            step={20}
358	          />
359	          <div className="flex justify-between text-xs text-muted-foreground">
360	            <span>{t('workspace.step2Low')}</span>
361	            <span>{t('workspace.step2High')}</span>
362	          </div>
363	        </CardContent>
364	      </Card>
365	
366	      <Button className="w-full" size="lg" data-testid="workspace-generate-btn" onClick={handleGenerate} disabled={loading || (!jobText && !selectedPostingId)}>
367	        {loading ? t('common.generating') : t('workspace.generate')}
368	      </Button>
369	
370	      {result?.content ? (
371	        <Card className="flex-1" data-testid="workspace-result-content">
372	          <CardContent className="pt-6">
373	            <WorkspacePanelTitle icon={Sparkles}>{t('workspace.result')}</WorkspacePanelTitle>
374	            <ScrollArea className="max-h-[min(60vh,520px)] pr-4">
375	              {(() => {
376	                const paragraphs = splitParagraphs(String(result.content));
377	                if (sectionTitles.length > 0 && sectionTitles.length === paragraphs.length) {
378	                  return (
379	                    <div className="space-y-5">
380	                      {paragraphs.map((p, i) => (
381	                        <div key={i}>
382	                          <h4 className="mb-1.5 text-sm font-semibold text-primary">{sectionTitles[i]}</h4>
383	                          <HighlightedContent
384	                            content={p}
385	                            detections={detections.filter((d) => p.includes(d.sentence))}
386	                          />
387	                        </div>
388	                      ))}
389	                    </div>
390	                  );
391	                }
392	                return <HighlightedContent content={String(result.content)} detections={detections} />;
393	              })()}
394	            </ScrollArea>
395	          </CardContent>
396	        </Card>
397	      ) : (
398	        <div className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-dashed bg-muted/20 p-8 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
399	          {t('workspace.panelEditor')} — {t('workspace.generate')}
400	        </div>
401	      )}
402	    </div>
403	  );
404	
405	  const resultsPanel = (
406	    <ScrollArea className="h-full max-h-[calc(100svh-7rem)]">
407	      <div className="space-y-6 pr-3">
408	        <WorkspacePanelTitle icon={Sparkles}>{t('workspace.panelResults')}</WorkspacePanelTitle>
409	
410	        {recommended.length > 0 && (
411	          <section className="space-y-2">
412	            <h3 className="text-sm font-medium">{t('workspace.recommended')}</h3>
413	            {recommended.map((r) => (
414	              <div key={r.id} className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-md border bg-background p-2 text-sm">
415	                <span className="truncate pr-2">{r.title}</span>
416	                <StatusChip label={`${(r.score * 100).toFixed(0)}%`} variant="primary" />
417	              </div>
418	            ))}
419	          </section>
420	        )}
421	
422	        {scores && (

427	                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
428	                    {SCORE_KEY_MAP[k] ? t(SCORE_KEY_MAP[k]) : k}
429	                  </p>
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-14 01:02:22Z)**_

원인을 찾았어요. [WorkspacePage.tsx:374](resume-web/src/pages/WorkspacePage.tsx#L374)의 `ScrollArea`가 `max-h-[...]`만 쓰고 있는데, Radix `ScrollArea`의 내부 `Viewport`는 `size-full`(height 100%)로 부모 높이를 그대로 상속받는 구조라서, 부모가 `max-height`만 갖고 실제 `height`가 정해지지 않으면 퍼센트 높이 계산이 안 되어 스크롤이 걸리지 않고 그냥 계속 늘어나 버립니다. `max-h`를 고정 `h`로 바꿔야 스크롤이 정상 동작합니다.

- `CompanyService.java` — 미사용 `AiGatewayClient` import 제거

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-14 01:08:53Z)**_

네, 이건 노이즈가 아니라 실제로 봐야 할 신호예요. Red Hat Dependency Analytics가 `build.gradle`에 명시된 버전들 — `postgresql`, `spring-boot-starter-actuator`, `querydsl-jpa/apt` — 이 Spring Boot 관리 버전에 묶여 있는데, 그 버전들에 알려진 HIGH 심각도 CVE가 있다는 뜻입니다.

원인은 `resume-api/build.gradle:3`에서 Spring Boot 플러그인을 `3.5.0`으로 고정해뒀기 때문이에요(`3.5.16`이 최신 패치). Spring Boot 버전을 올리면 `postgresql`·`actuator` 등 관리 대상 의존성들이 자동으로 최신 패치 버전으로 따라 올라가서 대부분 해소될 가능성이 높습니다. querydsl은 Boot가 직접 관리하지 않는 의존성이라 별도 확인이 필요합니다.

지금 요청하신 커밋/푸시부터 마무리할게요. 이어서 Spring Boot 3.5.16 패치 업그레이드를 원하시면 별도로 진행할까요? (마이너 패치라 리스크는 낮지만, 의존성 버전 변경이라 확인 후 진행하겠습니다.)
